# Hocan Holdings

> Hocan Holdings is a Kenyan company providing HR consulting, logistics, and business consulting services across East Africa. Established in 2015 and headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya.

## Company Overview

Hocan Holdings is a comprehensive logistics and consulting provider dedicated to business success across Kenya and East Africa. Since 2015, Hocan Holdings has supported companies across the region with logistics and consulting solutions designed for scale. The company has a particular speciality in the hospitality and services industry.

- Website: https://hocanholdings.co.ke
- Phone: +254 791 235 830
- Email: info@hocanholdings.co.ke
- Location: iHiT Building, Nairobi, Kenya
- Founded: 2015

## Mission

Providing service excellence at competitive pricing for best value. A one stop service provider to both local and international markets, with a niche in Hospitality and Gaming industries.

## Vision

To be the regional premier provider of choice.

## Core Values

- Integrity: Business based on trust, adhering to the highest ethical standards
- Gratitude: Positive-minded team that embraces gratitude as the key to greatness
- Excellence: Continuous improvement in performance and efficiency
- Passion: Pride, enthusiasm, and dedication in everything we do

## Services

### Hocan HR Consulting
HR consulting and workforce solutions for organizations across East Africa, with deep expertise in the hospitality and services industry.
- Talent Acquisition & Recruitment: End-to-end hiring solutions tailored to your business
- Corporate Training & Professional Development: Expert-led programs to upskill your workforce
- Labour Outsourcing & Workforce Solutions: Flexible staffing and managed workforce services
- HR360 - Complete HR Management Solution: All-in-one HR platform for modern businesses
- Startup HR Advisory: Strategic HR guidance for early-stage and growing startups
- URL: https://hocanholdings.co.ke/hocan-hr-consulting.html

### Hocan Logistics
Reliable delivery and logistics services across Kenya and East Africa.
- Same-day and next-day delivery in major urban centers
- Real-time tracking
- Dedicated account management
- Enterprise packages with SLA-backed delivery windows
- Priority dispatch, bulk shipment handling, and scheduled pickups
- Multi-location support with customized logistics workflows
- URL: https://hocanholdings.co.ke/hocan-logistics.html

### Hocan Consult
Consultancy services and strategic support across multiple domains.
- HR Consultancy
- Legal Consultancy
- Food & Beverage Consultancy
- Tax Management

## Industries Served

- Hospitality (primary speciality — hotels, restaurants, resorts, catering, events)
- Services industry (facility management, cleaning, security, customer-facing operations)
- Corporate / Enterprise
- Startups
- Government and NGOs
